title: EvidenceEntry
description: One scored observation of a real Copilot session against a single IMP. Produced by runner/telemetry.py.

session_id.description: Full UUID from the Copilot session-store (sessions.id).

fingerprint_matches.description: Names of regex fingerprints (from telemetry.py ALL_FINGERPRINTS) that matched in this session.

observations.description: Full QBObservations dataclass dump. Schema not enforced here; see telemetry.py for fields.

notes.description: Human-readable scorer explanation. Becomes the 'notes' field of the IMP manual_evidence YAML line.
